examples: He brought up an interesting point.
It's hard to bring up children alone.
She brought up the issue during the meeting.
Why did you bring that up?
He was brought up in a strict household.
They brought up their kids to be respectful.
Don't bring up that topic again.
Let's not bring up the past.
She was brought up by her grandmother.
example_translate: Она подняла вопрос во время встречи.
bring up.synonyms:
Воспитывать, растить (детей) - raise, rear, nurture
Поднимать (тему, вопрос) - mention, raise, introduce
